sample_reviews.author: James Thornton
sample_reviews.text: Called Piccadilly Plumbing after a burst pipe and they were with me within the hour. Professional, tidy and reasonably priced. Couldn't recommend them more highly.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah Mitchell
sample_reviews.text: Had a new bathroom fitted from start to finish. The team were brilliant — kept me informed throughout and the quality of the work is fantastic. Will definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: David Okafor
sample_reviews.text: Boiler service carried out quickly and efficiently. Friendly engineer who explained everything clearly. Good value for money in the city centre.

brand.usp: Based in the heart of Manchester, Piccadilly Plumbing Ltd delivers fast, no-fuss plumbing solutions for homes and businesses across the city — with transparent pricing and a same-day emergency response.
brand.hero_headline: Manchester's Trusted Plumbers, Ready When You Are
brand.about_paragraph: We're Piccadilly Plumbing Ltd, a Manchester-based plumbing company operating right from the city centre at Piccadilly. We take pride in offering honest, reliable plumbing services to homes and businesses across Greater Manchester, from routine boiler services to emergency call-outs. When you call us, you get a qualified, friendly professional who respects your property and gets the job done right first time.
